title: CodeVerse Academy
description: A premium Next.js learning platform for web development, data science, AI/ML, interview prep, practice work, certificates, blogs, and guided reading. Features interactive code playground, AI revision assistant, certificate studio, and comprehensive tutorial books.

title: LifeOS AI
description: A full-stack SaaS platform combining time management, career planning, habit tracking, and AI coaching into one unified dashboard. Features AI-powered coaching via OpenAI/Gemini/Claude, gamification (XP, levels, streaks), Docker deployment, and CI/CD.

title: Analyst Portfolio
description: A comprehensive portfolio website showcasing my skills, projects, and professional journey as a full stack developer.

title: Backend Portfolio
description: Dedicated backend development portfolio highlighting server-side projects, APIs, and database work.

title: Slide-to-Sketch Note Studio
description: A visual learning companion that transforms plain-text DSA notes into beautifully styled, notebook-style slides with interactive algorithm visualizations. Export as PNG, JPEG, or multi-page PDF.

title: Mubarakh Soob Portfolio
description: A professional portfolio website built for client Mubarakh Soob, featuring modern design and smooth interactions.

title: Nur Academy
description: Islamic e-learning platform built with React and Vite. Features YouTube course integration, streak tracking, lesson notes, progress analytics, and certificate PDF export via html2canvas + jspdf. Optional Supabase OAuth (Google sign-in) with a failsafe localStorage backend.

title: Ali Nawaz Academy
description: Islamic learning platform offering Aalim courses, Seerah, and more. Built with React and Vite.

title: Al-Kowser Academy
description: Premium Islamic Learning Management System (LMS) built with React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS. Full student/admin dashboards, course catalog with video player, bookmarking, support ticketing with screenshots, certificate generation, and Supabase auth for OAuth (Google/GitHub). Zustand for state management.

title: Unified Islamic Knowledge Portal
description: A unified static portal merging HanafiWeb@ and Sunni-Islamic-Website into one site. Features topic-based entry cards, a searchable archive, and 30+ preserved HTML pages with downloadable PDF books.
